title: Ashe County Man Arrested for Child Sexual Exploitation
summary: A man in Ashe County has been charged with child sexual exploitation following a 5-month investigation. The warrant alleges he filmed the child performing a sex act.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing efforts to combat child exploitation and the severe consequences for offenders.

title: Durham Man Charged with Charlotte Bank Robberies
summary: Stephen Ford is accused of robbing three banks in Charlotte over two weeks, stealing over $13,000. He was apprehended by police.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about crime rates and bank security in the Charlotte area.

title: Queen City Quarter (Formerly EpiCentre) to Be Sold
summary: The Queen City Quarter, previously known as EpiCentre, is expected to be put on the market soon. Details on the sale are still emerging.
charlotte_impact: Indicates changes in the commercial real estate landscape of Charlotte.

title: Record Heat Followed by Weather Shift
summary: Charlotte experiences record-breaking heat before a return to average March temperatures after Thursday's rain, with a further drop next week.
charlotte_impact: Discusses the impact of climate change and weather patterns on daily life.

title: Silfab Solar Updates Fort Mill Operations After Incidents
summary: Silfab Solar is working with South Carolina officials to repair its Fort Mill facility after two incidents last week. Operations are being assessed.
charlotte_impact: Addresses environmental concerns and the importance of safety in industrial operations.

title: Police Seek Public Help in Locating Missing Statesville Man
summary: David Dewayne Simpson was last seen on March 3 along Davie Avenue in Statesville. Police are asking for the public's assistance.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about missing persons cases and the role of the community in assisting law enforcement.

title: School Bus Crash Under Investigation in Matthews
summary: A school bus crash occurred on Matthews Township Parkway near Sam Newell Road around 6:30 a.m. The incident is under investigation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of school bus safety and traffic regulations.

title: Wastewater Spill at Lake Norman Addressed by Charlotte Water
summary: Charlotte Water responded to a wastewater spill at Lake Norman caused by a contractor damaging a low-pressure pipe. Cleanup efforts are underway.
charlotte_impact: Addresses environmental concerns and the importance of infrastructure maintenance.

title: Berger–Page Race Remains Close; Military Ballots Pending
summary: The Berger–Page race remains very close as election officials await military and overseas ballots in Guilford and Rockingham counties.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of every vote in close elections.

title: Missing Gastonia Teen Found Safe in Florida
summary: A 16-year-old missing from Gastonia was found in Florida with a Charlotte man after a traffic stop. The case is now resolved.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the effectiveness of law enforcement in locating missing persons.

title: Thousands Demand Duke Energy Audit After Bill Spike
summary: A petition calls for an audit of Duke Energy following a spike in power bills. Duke Energy explains the reasons and offers customer support.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about energy costs and the accountability of utility companies.

title: Charlotte Begins Construction on New Blue Line Station
summary: Construction starts this month on a new Blue Line rail station in Charlotte's South End, promising modern amenities and community focus.
charlotte_impact: Highlights infrastructure development and improvements in public transportation.

title: Third Rabies Case Reported in Lincoln County
summary: A third rabies case of 2026 has been reported in Lincoln County and referred to the NC Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about public health concerns and animal control measures.

title: Multivitamins May Slow Cellular Aging in Seniors
summary: A daily multivitamin may modestly slow cellular aging in seniors, but experts emphasize it should supplement, not replace, a healthy diet.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights into health and wellness for seniors.

title: Search Continues for Missing Anson County Teen
summary: The search is ongoing for a missing teen last seen along South Leak Street in the Morven area of Anson County. Authorities are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing efforts to locate missing individuals and the concerns of the community.
